title: Puffy Chewy French Oat Souffle
description: A fermented, chewy, and macrobiotic-friendly French dish featuring oat milk, perfect for a midnight craving. This souffle is made with kneaded dough and baked to a puffy perfection.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine oat milk, rolled oats, whole wheat flour, salt, sugar, and yeast.
Knead the mixture for 10 minutes until it forms a sticky dough.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it ferment in a warm place for 2 hours.
Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a souffle dish.
Bake the souffle for 35 minutes or until it is puffy and golden brown.
Remove the souffle from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
